name: Zero Risk — Video Pipeline: Seedance → FFmpeg → Multi-Platform Export (Webhook)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "query": "Brand guidelines, visual identity, video production style, color palette, tone, messaging",
  "k": 20,
  "duration_s": {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s }},
  "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}",
  "video_brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief) ?? null) }},
  "style": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.style }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}"
}

={
  "agent": "video-editor",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "task": {{ JSON.stringify(('Produce video production brief for: ' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief + ' (' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s + 's, ' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio + ', style: ' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.style + '). Deliver: storyboard (5-6 scenes), Seedance 2.0 prompt, color grading notes, audio specs, subtitle script, multi-platform export specs.') ?? null) }},
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "duration_s": {{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s }},
  "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}",
  "style": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.style }}",
  "video_brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief) ?? null) }},
  "target_platforms": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms) ?? null) }},
  "reference_image": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.reference_image) ?? null) }},
  "workflow_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}",
  "context": { "smoke_test": {{ ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || "").startsWith("smoke-") }} },
  "extra": { "brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json) ?? null) }}, "brand_context": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Client Brain: Style Guides').item.json) ?? null) }} }
}

={
  "model": "seedance-2.0",
  "prompt": {{ JSON.stringify($('Agent: Video Editor (Script → Storyboard)').item.json.seedance_prompt || ($('Agent: Video Editor (Script → Storyboard)').item.json.response && $('Agent: Video Editor (Script → Storyboard)').item.json.response.seedance_prompt) || $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief) }},
  "duration": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
  "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}",
  "reference_image": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.reference_image) ?? null) }},
  "style": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.style }}",
  "quality": "720p",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}"
}

={
  "bucket": "video_assets",
  "path": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}/generated/{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}/{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}_base.mp4",
  "file_url": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Higgsfield Seedance 2.0: Generate Video').item.json.video_url) ?? null) }},
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "video_url": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Higgsfield Seedance 2.0: Generate Video').item.json.video_url) ?? null) }},
  "target_platforms": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms) ?? null) }},
  "duration_s": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
  "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}",
  "metadata": {
    "prompt": {{ JSON.stringify($('Agent: Video Editor (Script → Storyboard)').item.json.seedance_prompt || '') }},
    "model": "seedance-2.0",
    "duration": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
    "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}"
  }
}

={
  "model": "whisper-1",
  "audio_url": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Higgsfield Seedance 2.0: Generate Video').item.json.video_url) ?? null) }},
  "response_format": "vtt",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "video_url": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Higgsfield Seedance 2.0: Generate Video').item.json.video_url) ?? null) }},
  "target_platforms": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms) ?? null) }},
  "duration_s": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
  "aspect_ratio": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.aspect_ratio }}"
}

={
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "input_url": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Higgsfield Seedance 2.0: Generate Video').item.json.video_url) ?? null) }},
  "exports": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Platform Export Specs').item.json.exports_config) ?? null) }},
  "add_subtitles": true,
  "subtitle_vtt": {{ JSON.stringify($('OpenAI Whisper: Auto-Subtitle').item.json.content || '') }},
  "target_platforms": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms) ?? null) }},
  "duration_s": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
  "video_brief": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief) ?? null) }}
}

={
  "task_type": "video_generation",
  "agent_slug": "video-editor",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id }}",
  "task_input": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.video_brief) ?? null) }},
  "output_summary": {{ JSON.stringify('Video generated for ' + (($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms || []).join(', ')) + ' (' + $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s + 's)') }},
  "success": true,
  "duration_ms": 0,
  "cost_usd": 0,
  "target_platforms": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.target_platforms) ?? null) }},
  "duration_s": {{ Number($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.duration_s) || 15 }},
  "export_urls": {{ JSON.stringify($('FFmpeg: Transcode All Platforms').item.json.export_urls || {}) }}
}
